summary: 12 changes in 3 waves. W0: c001 layered workspace (Opus 4.8) then c002 wasm spike. W1: six parallel worktree lanes across 4 harnesses (codex gpt-5.6, claude sonnet-5/opus-4.8, opencode glm-5.2, kimi k2.6) — no provider-quota contention between heavy lanes. W2: Flutter (sonnet-5) parallel React (gpt-5.6) then vertical-slice integration (opus-4.8). OpenSpec proposals created for all 12. gen_ui_types trait seams freeze after c001 review. First change: c001; c008/c009 may start immediately.
